title: Hogenakkal Falls
tagline: Hogenakkal Falls — heritage city of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Hogenakkal Falls is a waterfall in South India on the Kaveri river on the border between Dharmapuri district of Tamil Nadu and Chamrajnagar district of Karnataka.
overview.description: Hogenakkal Falls is a waterfall in South India on the Kaveri river on the border between Dharmapuri district of Tamil Nadu and Chamrajnagar district of Karnataka. It is located 46 km (29 mi) from Dharmapuri and 199 km (124 mi) from Chamrajnagar. Carbonatite rocks in this site are considered to be the oldest of its kind in South Asia and one of the oldest in the world. The Government of Tamil Nadu made a proposal to convert the falls into providing drinking water for the state.

topPlaces.name: Hogenakkal, Dharmapuri
topPlaces.description: Hogenakkal is a hamlet in the Pennagaram taluk of Dharmapuri district, tamil name is Thalaineer aruvi(தலைநீர் அருவி). Ugunir Kal/Marikottayam in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Biligundlu
topPlaces.description: Biligundlu, also known as Thiruvillikuntru, is a small village in the Bank of Kaveri. There is a water measuring station, set up by the Central Water Commission at Biligundlu (inter-State border) in Krishnagiri district of Tamil Nadu.

items.note: Hogenakkal is a hamlet in the Pennagaram taluk of Dharmapuri district, tamil name is Thalaineer aruvi(தலைநீர் அருவி). Ugunir Kal/Marikottayam in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

Biligundlu, also known as Thiruvillikuntru, is a small village in the Bank of Kaveri. There is a water measuring station, set up by the Central Water Commission at Biligundlu (inter-State border) in Krishnagiri district of Tamil Nadu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Hogenakkal Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Hogenakkal Falls is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Hogenakkal Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kempegowda International Airport, Bengaluru (120 km) and the nearest railway station is KSR Bengaluru City Junction (98 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Hogenakkal Falls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Hogenakkal Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Hogenakkal Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Hogenakkal Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Hogenakkal Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Hogenakkal, Dharmapuri, Biligundlu.
